title: Hanging On
description: A Mod that overhauls chains in ways such as, making them climbable, remaking their recipe, adding new special uses, and more!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4f12f23367843b97e5053445201fe1809d9f63d.png)
![Chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff0529f2a0e01207cab26b6c514a204fb64765f5.png)

Hanging On aims to make chains more useful and convenient, and allowing them to be a part of more builds!

Features:

-Climbable chains! You can now climb chains, just like you'd do with ladders and vines!

-Get them nuggets ready! Chains are now cheaper, being crafted with just 3 iron nuggets in a straight, upward line. it can be crafted anywhere in the crafting table too!

-Hang on! Sneak-Right Click Chain blocks with more chains in your hand/off-hand, and you can place more chains right below the original chain you sneak-right clicked, for up to 2 blocks down! Makes it easy to descend down into caves and big drops!

-Secret connections revealed! You can now tie leads to chains, just like you'd do with fences! A great piece of decor, methinks.

We recommend pairing the mod with the [Unchained](https://modrinth.com/mod/unchained) Mod for maximum peak chain action!

![More chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff0529f2a0e01207cab26b6c514a204fb64765f5.png)
![Steve waiving while he's hanging on to some chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0c07abdeae3600b5f570b918cca393d200d7425.png)
